ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot enjoying an ice cream cone.  The sequence starts with the robot's arms at its sides, then one arm lifts to scoop an imaginary ice cream cone, then the arm brings the cone to the mouth before finally returning to a relaxed state. The other arm remains largely still to emphasize the action of eating.  The movements will be exaggerated slightly for comedic effect.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for a treat
the left arm scoops an imaginary ice cream cone
bringing the sweet treat up to the mouth
